answers: Beginner gym plan: start with compound movements — squats, deadlifts, bench press, rows, overhead press. 3 sets of 8-12 reps.
Gym tips: warm up 5-10 min, learn proper form before adding weight, don't skip leg day, and stay consistent.
Best exercises: squats (legs), deadlifts (back/legs), bench press (chest), pull-ups (back), shoulder press (shoulders).
Gym e prothom: machine diye shuru koro, free weight e aste aste jao, form thik koro, ar consistent thako.
